propertyDetails.propertyAddress: Flat 202, UrbanRoof Sample Site, Baner Road, Pune, Maharashtra 411045

inspectionAnalysis.previousAuditOrRepairs: No previous audit or repair history reported

impactedAreas.description: Dampness visible at lower wall and skirting with paint blistering and mild fungal spotting.
Mold growth and moisture staining along wall finish adjacent to bathroom zone.
Cold-wall dampness with surface discoloration and recurring seepage marks.
Moisture traces near shaft wall and lower plaster softening.
Localized damp patch near corner and ceiling junction suggesting migration from upper wet area.
Thermal cold patches and dampness at beam-column interface below wet area stack.
Water ingress band and flaking finish at ceiling level, likely from tile joints above.

positiveSideInputs.description: Open tile joints, hollow-sounding tiles and likely seepage through floor and wall interfaces.
Grout deterioration and threshold ponding path allowing migration under tile bed.
Potential slab and waterproofing defects contributing to ceiling level ingress.
Moderate facade cracks, algae or fungus staining and plumbing-related wetting on outer face.

bathroom.notes: Bathroom tile joint hollowness and open joints identified in Flat 203.

balcony.notes: Threshold wetness and grout deterioration observed.

terrace.notes: Possible delayed waterproofing distress affecting ceiling band.

externalWall.notes: Moderate cracks, algae or fungus and external plumbing issues noted.

summaryTable.link: Open tile joints and hollow tiles transferring moisture through masonry.
Ingress at ceiling level due to failed tile or slab waterproofing detail.
Repeated saturation moving down service alignment.
Rainwater penetration and outer wall wetting contributing to dampness.

missingInformation: Exact repair history before the inspection is not available in the uploaded inspection form.
